name: backflow-compliance-mvp
description: Backflow and plumbing compliance management MVP monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @backflow/web" "npm run start:dev -w @backflow/api"
scripts.infra:up: (docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d)
scripts.infra:down: (docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down || docker-compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down)
